ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_laws" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun law */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "background_checks" TEXT /* Background check requirements for the state (e.g., universal, partial) */,
  "waiting_period" INTEGER /* Whether the state has a waiting period for gun purchases */,
  "concealed_carry" INTEGER /* Whether the state allows concealed carry */,
  "open_carry" INTEGER /* Whether the state allows open carry */,
  "assault_weapon_ban" INTEGER /* Whether the state has an assault weapon ban */,
  "high_capacity_magazine_ban" INTEGER /* Whether the state has a high capacity magazine ban */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_safety_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun safety grade */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the state's gun safety laws (A-F) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_death_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun death rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Gun death rate per 100,000 population */,
  "rate_year" INTEGER /* Year when the rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_law_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun law update */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gun laws table */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
